text:
Juhnde (ユンデ, Yunde) is a biochemist who took part in the 289th Hunter Exam, but was failed by Kurapika as he was found to have information on the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 33, Chapter 348 

Appearance

Juhnde is an old man with prominent wrinkles on his face, an elongated nose, droopy eyes, sharp cheekbones, a cleft chin, neatly combed back hair, and a mustache. 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

Mizaistom mentions Juhnde and Muherr as two rejected examinees of great skill. This leads him to dismiss Kurapika's hypothesis of spies who have had their memories altered in order to fool the lie detectors. Regarding his great skills, Mizaistom had planned to let him mediate between the Biology and Science Divisions; however, when the truth machine caught him, he even doubted it was working properly. Mizaistom theorizes that his sender would have used any means to let him pass the test, considering the high position he may cover.
